variants.title: HiFi Filter RT 40 Fuel Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAB 547
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter RT 40 Fuel Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAB 547. Easy to install and replace, the RT 40 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
